landing.tagline: Direct Farm-to-Buyer Trade — No Barriers, No Middlemen.
landing.heroDescription: Kropigo is the premier digital marketplace connecting dedicated farmers directly with mindful buyers. Transparent pricing, verified networks, and zero middlemen.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Everything you need to buy and sell produce confidently, built specifically for the modern agricultural economy.
landing.directMarketDesc: List crops directly on the platform and bypass traditional middlemen. Keep more of your profits while offering buyers fresher produce.
landing.liveMandiDesc: Make informed decisions with real-time pricing insights from local Mandis. Never guess the true value of your harvest again.
landing.verifiedNetworkDesc: Trade with confidence. Every Kisan and Buyer undergoes identity verification to ensure a secure, trustworthy ecosystem.
landing.howItWorksSubtitle: Three simple steps to revolutionize your agricultural trade.
landing.step1Desc: Register as either a Kisan (Farmer) or a Buyer. Setup takes less than two minutes with basic contact details.
landing.step2Desc: Complete a quick verification process to unlock full platform features and build trust within the community.
landing.step3Desc: Start listing your harvest with photos and pricing, or browse available crops to purchase directly from the source.

auth.welcomeCompleteProfile: Welcome to KropiGo! Please complete your profile details and upload verification documents.
auth.rootedInCommunitySubtitle: Join a network of dedicated growers and mindful buyers building a sustainable local food ecosystem.
auth.welcomeBackSubtitle: Continue your journey with our local food ecosystem. Good to see you again.
auth.joinNetworkDesc: Join a network of dedicated growers and mindful buyers building a sustainable local food ecosystem.

profileSetup.heroSubtitleKisan: Tell us your name and we'll take you straight to your kisan dashboard.

buyerOrders.subtitle: Track and audit every confirmed crop purchase pipeline from verification to safe delivery.

buyerOrderView.title: Order Details
buyerOrderView.nextStepsDesc: The kisan has accepted your offer! Our team will contact you shortly to arrange logistics and finalize the transaction. For privacy reasons, direct contact details are kept hidden until confirmed.
buyerOrderView.contactDetailsHidden: Contact details will be shared by our team.

buyerInterests.title: My Interests
buyerInterests.subtitle: Track and manage all purchase offers submitted directly to agricultural producers.

buyerInterests.noDeclinedSub: Declined interest offers and counter-proposals will populate here.
buyerInterests.noWithdrawnSub: Interests you explicitly retracted or canceled are archived here.
